sections.paragraph:
masculine noun וויליס ד. גטץ'

Willis D. Gatch (1877-1962), famous United States surgeon who contributed much to research (particularly in the day to day practice of Clinical Surgery), instrumental docotr who was extremely helpful in the development of safe nitrous oxide anesthesia, developer of the features of a surgical bed enabling the legs to be raised high and folded (the device still bears his name today)
